SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline

Class AviffScreeningCalculator

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.mechanicaldesign.pipeline.AviffScreeningCalculator
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class AviffScreeningCalculator extends Object implements Serializable
Flow-induced vibration (FIV) likelihood-of-failure screening for process main-line piping, following the screening methodology of the Energy Institute "Guidelines for the Avoidance of Vibration Induced Fatigue Failure in Process Pipework" (often referred to as the AVIFF guidelines).

The main-line FIV screening compares the kinetic energy of the flow (ρv²) against a Fatigue Vibration Factor (FVF) that depends on the pipe size and a Fatigue Correction Factor (FCF) that depends on the small-bore connection and support arrangement. A Likelihood Of Failure (LOF) is then formed:

LOF = (ρ v² × GVFcorr) / (FVF × FCF)

The Gas Void Fraction (GVF) correction increases the screening value in the multiphase region where intermittent (slug/churn) flow can drive higher dynamic excitation. The acceptance bands are:

  • LOF < 0.5 – LOW (acceptable)
  • 0.5 ≤ LOF < 1.0 – MEDIUM (further assessment required)
  • LOF ≥ 1.0 – HIGH (redesign / detailed dynamic analysis)

The FVF correlation here approximates the Energy Institute main-line graph and is intended for screening only; a detailed assessment is required for any line that does not screen out as LOW.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • AviffScreeningCalculator

      public AviffScreeningCalculator()
      Default constructor for AviffScreeningCalculator.

  • Method Details

    • setFlowConditions

      public void setFlowConditions(double density, double velocity, double gvf)
      Sets the flow conditions.
      Parameters:
      density - mixture density in kg/m3 (must be > 0)
      velocity - mixture velocity in m/s (must be ≥ 0)
      gvf - gas void fraction (0-1)

    • setPipeInternalDiameter

      public void setPipeInternalDiameter(double idMeters)
      Sets the pipe internal diameter.
      Parameters:
      idMeters - internal diameter in meters (must be > 0)

    • setSupportArrangement

      public void setSupportArrangement(AviffScreeningCalculator.SupportArrangement arrangement)
      Sets the support-arrangement category that drives the Fatigue Correction Factor.
      Parameters:
      arrangement - the support arrangement (must not be null)

    • computeFvf

      private double computeFvf(double idMeters)
      Computes the Fatigue Vibration Factor (FVF) as a function of pipe bore. This is a screening approximation of the Energy Institute main-line FVF graph: larger bores tolerate a higher kinetic energy before reaching a given likelihood of failure.
      Parameters:
      idMeters - pipe internal diameter in meters (must be > 0)
      Returns:
      Fatigue Vibration Factor in Pa

    • computeFcf

      private double computeFcf()
      Returns the Fatigue Correction Factor for the configured support arrangement.
      Returns:
      Fatigue Correction Factor (dimensionless)

    • computeGvfCorrection

      private double computeGvfCorrection(double gvf)
      Computes the gas void fraction correction. The largest amplification is in the intermittent multiphase region (roughly GVF 0.5-0.95) where slug and churn flow drive high dynamic loads; single-phase gas and single-phase liquid receive no amplification.
      Parameters:
      gvf - gas void fraction (0-1)
      Returns:
      GVF correction factor (≥ 1)

    • calcScreening

      public void calcScreening()
      Runs the AVIFF main-line FIV screening calculation.

    • getKineticEnergy

      public double getKineticEnergy()
      Returns the flow kinetic energy (ρv²).
      Returns:
      kinetic energy in Pa

    • getFatigueVibrationFactor

      public double getFatigueVibrationFactor()
      Returns the Fatigue Vibration Factor.
      Returns:
      Fatigue Vibration Factor in Pa

    • getFatigueCorrectionFactor

      public double getFatigueCorrectionFactor()
      Returns the Fatigue Correction Factor.
      Returns:
      Fatigue Correction Factor (dimensionless)

    • getGvfCorrection

      public double getGvfCorrection()
      Returns the gas void fraction correction factor.
      Returns:
      GVF correction factor (dimensionless)

    • getLikelihoodOfFailure

      public double getLikelihoodOfFailure()
      Returns the calculated Likelihood Of Failure.
      Returns:
      Likelihood Of Failure (dimensionless)

    • getLikelihoodBand

      public String getLikelihoodBand()
      Returns the Likelihood Of Failure band ("LOW", "MEDIUM" or "HIGH").
      Returns:
      likelihood band string

    • toJson

      public String toJson()
      Serializes the screening results to a pretty-printed JSON string.
      Returns:
      JSON representation of the screening results
